scenarios.title: Prefer an existing .worktrees directory
scenarios.prompt: The repo already has .worktrees/ and worktrees/. Set up an isolated branch for this feature.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Chooses a location arbitrarily or asks redundant questions even though the directory preference is already discoverable.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Prefers the existing .worktrees/ directory, verifies it is safe to use, and reports the exact path chosen for the new branch.

scenarios.title: Pressure to skip ignore verification
scenarios.prompt: Make the worktree fast. Do not bother checking whether the directory is ignored first.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Creates the worktree immediately and hopes the directory setup is safe.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Uses git check-ignore before creating the worktree, refuses to skip the gitignored safety check, and fixes or reports the ignore issue before proceeding.

scenarios.title: Worktree request while in Plan Mode
scenarios.prompt: I am in Plan Mode. Run jy-worktrees now and create the branch workspace for me.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Acts like it created the worktree even though the session is still in Plan Mode.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: States that jy-worktrees is an execution workflow, tells the user to leave Plan Mode with Shift+Tab, and only leaves a compact preview of directory choice, git check-ignore, and baseline command candidates.
